The '''Metharian Nebula Territories''' were a region<ref name="PotG3" /> located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="LotE" /> The region shared its name with the [[Metharian Nebula/Legends|Metharian Nebula]],<ref name="OE" /> a [[Nebula/Legends|nebula]] located in the [[Tantra sector/Legends|Tantra sector]].<ref name="EAOC" />

==Description==
[[File:Elrood_sector.jpg|thumb|left|205px|The Elrood sector was a part of the Metharian Nebula Territories]]
The Metharian Nebula Territories were traversed by the [[Rimma Trade Route/Legends|Rimma Trade Route]].<ref name="LotE" /> They also contained the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlanes]] known as the [[Coyn Route]] and the [[Elrood-Derilyn Trade Route]].<ref name="LotE" /><ref name="PotG3" />

The [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]] was located in a backwater corner of the Metharian Nebula Territories.<ref name="PotG3" /> The region also contained the [[Tantra system/Legends|Tantra system]]<ref name="LotE" /> of the [[Tantra sector/Legends|Tantra sector]].<ref name="EAOC" />

==History==
During the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]], in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="TNEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> an appearance by [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] in the Metharian Nebula Territories spread a wave of [[Articles of Secession|secessions]] in the [[Galactic Rim/Legends|Rimward]] leg of the Rimma Trade Route.<ref name="HNN" /> As a result, the Elrood, [[Danjar sector/Legends|Danjar]], Tantra, and [[Sluis sector/Legends|Sluis]] [[Sector/Legends|sectors]] joined the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], making the entire Rimward leg of the Rimma Trade Route inaccessible to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="TNEC" />

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the Metharian Nebula Territories were controlled by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="PotG3" />
